Query the monday.com board with id 1234567890.

  - restrict the boards query to boards whose hierarchy type is either
    "classic" or "multi_level"
  - for the board, return its name, its state, and its permissions
  - also return a page of the board's items, and for each item its id and name

Use the board's paginated items field for the nested items (no filtering
arguments are needed on it here).
